name: ClaudeBar
description: A macOS menu bar application that monitors AI coding assistant usage quotas. Keep track of your Claude, Codex, Antigravity ,and Gemini usage at a glance.
summaryZh: A macOS menu bar application that monitors AI coding assistant usage quotas. Keep track of your Claude, Codex, Antigravity ,and Gemini usage at a glance. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
